task_completion.description: All 4 original slides are preserved in the presentation.

integrity.description: The agent used the LibreOffice Impress GUI to modify the presentation.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show mouse clicks and navigation through LibreOffice menus (e.g., Slide -> Slide Properties) rather than terminal commands or python scripts.

integrity.description: The agent saved the changes to the original file path.
